name: Chinese Cabbage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat.
2. Add salt and stir while cooking. Break the meat into small pieces.
3. Drain off any excess fat.
4. Add the water and the seasoning packet included with the ramen noodles.
5. Add soy sauce and mix well.
6. Break up the noodles and spread over the meat.
7. Cover and cook until the noodles are tender.
8. Add onion, green pepper, and pimento. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Add shredded cabbage and continue cooking until the cabbage is tender.
10. Allow to stand covered for about 10 minutes before serving.
